entries.title: Vibe Check Engine
entries.description: Architected and released a high-end, data-driven portfolio system for minimalists. Built with Next.js 15 and React 19.

entries.title: ZimaOS Home Lab
entries.description: Deployed a private cloud and media server environment using ZimaOS and CasaOS on repurposed hardware.

entries.title: Gym Streak Tracker
entries.description: Published a dedicated tracking system for weight training and body recomposition. Focused on 6-day split optimization.

entries.title: Grade XI IT Exhibition
entries.description: Developed and presented an AI Voice Assistant (Jarvis UI) for my college Science and IT exhibition in Nepal.

entries.title: EndeavourOS / Arch Rice
entries.description: Designed a custom KDE Plasma environment with a focus on monochrome aesthetics and terminal-centric workflows.

entries.title: C Programming Lab Reports
entries.description: Documented advanced control statements and logic implementations as part of Grade XI academic curriculum.

entries.title: CurseForge Author Program
entries.description: Joined the Minecraft developer rewards program as a texture pack artist and open-source contributor.

entries.title: The Path of Ikigai
entries.description: Began integrating the philosophy of purpose and minimalist living into my development workflow and daily habits.
